expectations.text: Identifies this as a deemed export situation under 22 CFR 120.50
expectations.evidence: Section 1 heading is 'Recognize This as a Deemed Export Situation' and cites 22 CFR § 120.50 directly.

expectations.text: States that a TAA or individual licence may be required before access is granted
expectations.evidence: Section 2 explicitly states a TAA (22 CFR § 124.1) or Individual Export License (DSP-5/Part 125) must be obtained before the engineer accesses any ITAR-controlled data.

expectations.text: Explains Technology Control Plan (TCP) requirements for foreign visitor access
expectations.evidence: Section 4 is entirely dedicated to 'Technology Control Plan (TCP) — Visitor Procedures' covering physical access, IT controls, visitor logs, and staff briefings.

expectations.text: Mentions screening against DDTC debarred parties list and OFAC SDN list
expectations.evidence: Section 3 explicitly lists 'DDTC Debarred Parties List (22 CFR § 127.7)' and 'OFAC Specially Designated Nationals (SDN) List' as required screening.

expectations.text: Clarifies that German citizenship (not work visa status) determines export destination for deemed export purposes
expectations.evidence: Section 1 states 'the deemed export determination is based on the engineer's nationality (German citizenship), not their work visa type, work authorization status, or length of stay.'
